title: Invite others and get up to 1 year free!
eventEndedDescription: We'll be back with new benefits and events next year.

howTo.title: How to participate
howTo.step1: Share your invite link with others.
howTo.step2: When the invitee visits Docshunt through the link and completes a paid purchase, the invite counts.
howTo.step3: Invitees get a 10% discount on their first purchase.
howTo.step4: Get +1 month at 5 invites, and +11 months at 10 invites, automatically credited.

notice.title: Notice
notice.item2: Only the first paid purchase by each invitee counts.
notice.item3: If an invitee cancels their purchase, that invite will be deducted. If this causes you to no longer meet the reward threshold, granted rewards may be revoked.
notice.item4: If you have an active plan, the reward days will extend your current plan. Otherwise, a plan will be issued for the reward duration.
